description: Skill router for /wf-quick. 10 sub-commands (quick, rca, probe, investigate, discover, hotfix, update-deps, refactor, ideate, simplify). No sweep mode — sub-commands are orthogonal entry points. `probe` is the only sub-command that is slug-mode only (refuses to run without an existing slug). Documentation work moved to /wf-docs in v9.4.0; intake moved to /wf in v9.1.0. Invoke as /wf-quick <subcommand> <args>.
